notes: Donut eats the Enhanced Pet Biscuit that Carl pulled from his Legendary Pet Box and instantly collapses into a quivering blob of goo — the start of a transformation. Because she doesn't teleport away, the game treats it as a non-negative result. New look: a shapeless, hairy, jellied mass with 'Waiting…' floating over it.

add.name: Transforming
add.description: Reduced to a shapeless, quivering blob of flesh after eating an Enhanced Pet Biscuit. The game displays 'Waiting…' over her while she is changed; Mordecai expects it to resolve in about 5–10 minutes.

sources.quote: Splat! The moment the cat hit the ground, she was transformed into a wet mess of flesh. She splattered like a hunk of hairy, jellied water.
Waiting… Waiting… appeared over the quivering, shaggy mass. … 'Transformation. Your creature is being changed somehow. It didn't teleport away, so it's not considered a negative result.'
